CustomField.description: Tracks when we last successfully pushed an outbound sync to this client. Stamped by DeliverySyncItemProcessor when it processes a Synced outbound SyncItem__c whose payload's destination resolves to this entity. Used by the Data Lineage / Data Flow widget to show "Last sync" for downstream client connections.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tracks when we last successfully pushed an outbound sync to this client.
CustomField.label: Last Outbound Sync
